rationale: The code faithfully implements Task 4a strictly within the frozen v13 scope (including the AM-40 PACKAGE_ROOTS ruling). The inventory is closed and defines exactly the required constants, including the deep-frozen D32 loader mapping and D33 per-weaver closures, verified through robust unit assertions. The shared util substrate delivers exactly the specified lexical scanner, module-load classifier, D26 counted-iterator with its required accounting lifecycle, D21 physical-containment wrapper, and no-shell Git execution boundary. The git and code weavers accurately implement deterministic extraction against exclusively driver-held, counted source iterators without inventing runtime features. Exhaustive closure/inventory integrity tests enforce strict alignment. Zero deviations or scope expansions.
